preamble: The correspondence between the voiced labiodental fricative [v] (or its bilabial stop reflex [b]) and the alveolar nasal [n] is documented in the Nakh-Dagestani language family, where labial consonants in one dialect correspond to nasals in related languages.
phoneticEffects: Nasal Correspondence, Place Shift, Dialectal Correspondence

examples.note: Regular correspondence where the Bats labial consonant corresponds to an alveolar nasal in Chechen.

sources: Phonological studies on Nakh language correspondences.
